hero.description: A creative marketing and strategy agency for brands ready to grow in the digital space.

vision.headerDescription: The vision that guides every project and our relationships with the brands that trust us. We believe in sustainable growth, authentic communication, and results measured over time.
vision.quote: This dream started with an idea and today it helps create many brands.
vision.imageAlt: Katherine Jiménez, General Manager at Oderbiz

about.headerDescription: An innovative agency leading social media content creation, with comprehensive services for growing brands.
about.paragraph1: We are an innovative agency leading the way in social media content creation. We take pride in offering a wide range of services designed to comprehensively meet our clients' needs.

aboutSpecializations.headerDescription: Content Marketing and Strategy services for established and growing businesses.
aboutSpecializations.bodyIntro: We take a holistic approach to marketing, analyzing your environment and business goals with a strategic vision to propose actions that strengthen your competitive edge.
aboutSpecializations.paragraph1: Oderbiz provides the tools your company needs to drive sales in a constantly evolving digital environment. As you build and grow, we guide your business to the forefront of digital marketing—as your partners every step of the way.
aboutSpecializations.specialization1: Digital strategy and executive support for businesses.
aboutSpecializations.specialization2: On-demand content creation and social media management.
aboutSpecializations.specialization3: Unlimited graphic design and video for businesses.

aboutSpecializations.specialization4Description:

valuePillars.headerDescription: Our own resources, ongoing support, and strategic focus to meet the needs of large clients.
valuePillars.pillar1Text: We have our own resources, teams, and infrastructure to support all the needs of large clients.
valuePillars.pillar2Text: We understand the value of your time and the urgency of every request. We become part of your team.
valuePillars.pillar2ImageAlt: Close collaboration with the Oderbiz team
valuePillars.pillar3Text: We align strategically and tactically with your company's goals to deliver the results you need, when you need them.

fortalezas.headerDescription: Creativity, structured processes, and a results-driven approach for brands that want to grow with purpose. Every project is backed by a multidisciplinary team and proven market methodologies.
fortalezas.intro1: We have a team of creative professionals who work together to create high-quality content for social media.
fortalezas.intro2: We focus on innovation and creativity to offer our clients a unique and differentiated experience.
fortalezas.strength1Title: We are highly efficient in planning, producing, and distributing content to ensure it aligns with our clients' goals and needs.
fortalezas.strength2Title: We understand the unique needs of large and growing businesses.
fortalezas.strength2Body: Our services are tailored to handle complex projects and deliver stable results.
fortalezas.strength3Title: We have structured processes adapted to our clients' needs.
fortalezas.strength3Body: Through our experience as an established agency, we have tested various processes and work methodologies until we found one that lets us work as a team with the client and respond to their real needs.
fortalezas.closingLead: The world is constantly changing, and Oderbiz follows that continuous line of change.
fortalezas.closingText: In today's digital era, it's essential to approach communication and marketing with a fresh, modern perspective—and nothing beats a solid content marketing strategy.

services.headerDescription: We offer integrated marketing, social media content creation, and on-demand corporate design. Each service adapts to your brand goals and your audience's needs.

marketing.title: Integrated Marketing
marketing.description: In today's digital era, it's essential to approach communication and marketing with a fresh, modern perspective—and nothing beats a solid content marketing strategy.
marketing.bullet1: Buyer research and analysis to identify the right strategy.
marketing.bullet2: Development of creative, effective advertising campaigns: Inbound and Outbound.

content.title: Content creation and social media management
content.description: Development of social media content strategies tailored to our clients' needs and their target audience.
content.bullet1: Development of social media content strategies tailored to our clients' needs and their target audience.
content.bullet2: Creation of original, high-quality content in multiple formats, including images and fully produced videos.
content.bullet3: Scheduling, distribution, and analysis of content across social platforms to ensure objectives are met.

design.title: On-demand corporate design
design.description: Corporate identity design, custom asset development, and corporate document layout.
design.bullet1: Corporate identity design, including logos, color schemes, and style guides.
design.bullet2: Custom design for websites, mobile applications, and printed marketing materials.
design.bullet3: Corporate slide design and document layout.

portfolio.headerDescription: Results that make an impact in every detail. Real projects where strategy, design, and execution come together for brands that want to grow with purpose.

coopsem.excerpt: Identity design for the municipal workers' credit cooperative in Loja: an isotype symbolizing unity and collaboration, brand manual, and merchandising applications.

padreJulian.excerpt: Isotype creation: evolution of the cooperative's logo into a friendly robotic character. Concept: blending institutional solidity with technological agility ("La Julián at a click"). Visual systems: service icon design, promotional banners, and adaptation for digital storefronts (App Store/Google Play).

nettplus.excerpt: Social Media: creation of a visual content calendar (lifestyle, gaming, promotional, and utility). Branding: adaptation of logos and the blue/green graphic line across all assets. Advertising: design of creatives for fiber optic plans and regional coverage.

odertek.excerpt: Visual content and digital campaigns for a telecom wholesaler: product catalog, partnerships with leading brands, and promotions for network infrastructure.

rectoralBoard.excerpt: Visual identity and institutional communication for executive training and high-level consulting in organizational leadership and management.

sinCulpa.excerpt: Full brand identity for a healthy food company: logo, stationery, packaging, and a natural, contemporary visual system.

uniODS.excerpt: Brand design integrating academic heritage and Sustainable Development Goals for UTPL's sustainable university initiative.

maestrias.excerpt: Development of content focused on academic promotion and generating interest in graduate programs through educational and advertising formats.

team.description: Behind every project is a multidisciplinary team that combines strategy, design, and technology. Professionals with real experience helping brands grow—committed to measurable results and lasting relationships.

testimonials.headerDescription: Real experiences from brands and institutions that have grown alongside Oderbiz. Testimonials that reflect our commitment to quality, creativity, and concrete results.

marisol.quote: I chose the company because it is well known in Loja and serious about the service it provides. I liked the approach taken for my services on social media, with a style exclusive to me. I recommend this agency because I have seen great results in my business.
marisol.name: Marisol Jiménez

ipAccess.quote: We are pleased with the openness and quick response to our requests. We recommend their services to other companies because they manage excellent processes.
ipAccess.name: Ip Access

ortam.quote: I chose this agency based on references from work with other clients and I am happy with the results. I highlight the quality and style of the videos they have produced for my company. I recommend their services for their way and style of working.
ortam.name: Ortam

elizabeth.quote: We chose this agency for its responsibility and agility in its services. We are very satisfied with the quality of service they provide to our institution and we recommend their work because they provide the resources needed to meet the client's goals and needs.
elizabeth.name: Elizabeth Hernández

oscar.quote: I chose this agency because it is the best in the city. I highlight the work and friendliness of the staff; I recommend this company for its quality.
oscar.name: Óscar Jiménez

luciano.quote: I like the teamwork between design, developers, and marketing that lets us think through solutions together and ensure a systemic view of the business. I chose this agency for its ability to understand my business aspirations, creativity in responses, flexibility in scheduling, and mutual commitment to entrepreneurial results.
luciano.name: Luciano Marcelino

maxxnet.quote: The most important characteristic of this agency is understanding the client, what they want to communicate, and reflecting that in their designs. I will keep recommending their work because they have experience and make a great contribution to companies' advertising.
maxxnet.name: Maxxnet

partners.description: Brands that trust our vision and execution. We build long-term relationships based on measurable results and transparent communication.
partners.carouselRow1: Partners and sponsors carousel, first row
partners.carouselRow2: Partners and sponsors carousel, second row

footer.tagline: Creative marketing and strategy agency. Trust and stability for major projects—the support growing brands need in Loja and beyond.
